title: Project MC 2
description: Adds over 15 new bosses. Adds new biomes, mechanics, weapons, dimensions and more to discover!
body: Project MC 2 aims to make an experience as close as possible to a sequel, while still keeping the game's vanilla features. Project MC 2 adds more than 15 new bosses, new biomes, mobs, dungeons and more. It also revamps the 2 existing bosses: the wither and the ender dragon. It also features a new end dimension biome. There's also more to come in the future! I hope you'll like the modpack!
